pages.text: Every living machine runs on $(flesh)Nutrients$() — and so do the living weapons. Nutrients are biomancy's universal fuel, and they come in three forms of rising convenience.
pages.title: Nutrients, the Fuel

pages.text: $(bold)The three forms:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Nutrients$() — hard energy-rich pellets; the raw form.$(li)$(flesh)Nutrient Paste$() — pellets moistened with Biotic Matter into a yellowish paste. The form machines drink most readily.$(li)$(flesh)Nutrient Bar$() — paste compressed into a bar; compact storage. Crafts back to paste freely.

$(flesh)Nutrient Paste$() is the form you will handle most. Load it into a machine's fuel slot, or into a living weapon, to top up its Nutrient reserve. It is the diet of the entire mechanical side of biomancy.

$(bold)Where it comes from.$() Nutrients are produced by the $(l:3_machines/digester)Digester$(), which renders food and organic matter down into them. A Digester running on your kitchen scraps will fuel a whole base of machines — see the next page.
pages.title: The Source
